text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Let's have a snowball fight, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. To tell you the truth, I'm trying to try lots
of new things recently!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The other day, a friend taught me knitting! Oh,
and yesterday, I made omelet rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Even though my knitting turned out all
tangled and I burnt my omelet, it was super-duper
fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I wanna try a snowball fight next! My friend
from the shopping district invited me to play! It'll
be two-on-two, with prizes at stake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her this eager to challenge herself, I can't
find it within me to refuse her.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's win it too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's completely snowed over! Isn't it pretty?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fine! I'll get nice and warm soon enough!
Plus, it's easier to move arou—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, everyone's already here! Hi, guys! I brought
my trainer along!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's eyes meet those of the other
participants. Behind their friendly smiles lies an
air of fierce competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Participant
text_block_list.text: Urara, we won't lose to you today! Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! We aren't losing either! Right, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Organizer
text_block_list.text:
The rules are simple! Get hit with snowballs three
times and you're out!

text_block_list.name: Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Utilize the snow trenches available and topple
the plastic flag in your opponent's field with a
snowball! Understood?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A strategy?! Wow! You sound just like a
commander!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I gotta think too! Hmm... Hnnngh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I think we should make a lotta snowballs! Should
we make and throw them together?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Or should we do those separately? What do you
think, Commander?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I consider all the ideas she throws my way and put
together a strategy. Soon after, the snowball
fight begins.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I think we've made enough snowballs. What about
the other team?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team in question launches snowballs in our
direction at periodic intervals, as if wary of our
advance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the openings make it possible to avoid their
projectiles while invading deep into their
territory.
choice_data_list: Time for us to go on the offensive!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Roger! I'll break their ranks, so you protect the
flag, Commander! And...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Cover me please!
choice_data_list: Will you be fine on your own?
Will you be fine on your own?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Don't worry! It's a competition, so it's no
different from a race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll whoosh through and win with a bang! Sit tight
and cheer for me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'll make sure our strategy is a success!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Snow scatters into the air after each footstep as
Haru Urara charges into the enemy's territory with
several snowballs in hand. When she returns...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We won, we won, we won!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! Our strategy was a great success!

text_block_list.name: Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Urara, congratulations! You really know how to
make a match exciting. Here's your prize!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow! It's a snow globe! Look at the snowmen
and snow rabbits! They're so cute! Yours matches
mine!
choice_data_list: Maybe I'll decorate my room with this.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, me too! That way, even if it's spring, summer,
or fall...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I can be reminded of the great fun I had today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Haru Urara in the picture, today's minor
snowball fight felt more like a large-scale field
day. Not even snow can slow her down.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Who knew they were hiding so many
snowballs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We made it to the semifinals only to fall prey to
the hidden stock of snowballs our opponents
prepared.

text_block_list.name: Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Urara! I gotta say, you came really
close there. Anyways, here's the runner-up prize!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a bath towel with snowman patterns?! Aww,
they're so smiley and adorable!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! 'Cause I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I know! Let's have another snowball fight
next year too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
When the time comes, let's think of more
strategies than we did today! And then, let's take
first place! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Against the chilly backdrop of snow, Haru Urara
shows me her trademark sunny smile.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Aww, nooo! We lost!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They were amazing though! I tried zipping past
them, but then those three snowballs were like
pow, pow, pow!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They must have had a number of strategies up
their sleeves too.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's win next time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I got some snowflake stickers for
participating! I'll share them with you later!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! This was so much fun, and we even got
stickers! ...I'm so glad we participated!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara hops and skips atop the snow as if to
show everyone her joyous mood.
